query:
_sourceCategory=*cse/windows/inventory 
| json field=_raw "whenCreated" nodrop
| json field=_raw "userAccountControl" nodrop
| json field=_raw "manager" nodrop
| json field=_raw "mail" nodrop
| json field=_raw "department" nodrop
| json field=_raw "givenName" nodrop
| json field=_raw "sn" nodrop
| json field=_raw "title" nodrop
| json field=_raw "sAMAccountName" as user_username nodrop
| "514" as userAccountControl
| where !(isBlank(lastlogon)) 
| where user_username matches "{{user_username}}"
| if(user_username matches "will.smith" AND isBlank(mail), "will.smith@windomain.local", mail) as mail
| if(user_username matches "will.smith" AND isBlank(manager), "CN=Napolean J. Dynamite,CN=Users,DC=windomain,DC=local", manager) as manager
| count as summ1 by user_username,department,givenName,sn,title,manager,physicalDeliveryOfficeName,mail,userAccountControl
| fields -summ1

sources.dashboardDescription: This dashboard provides User Telemetry related metrics.
